title: Ambassador Cardboard Postal Tube Box of 12 - 76mm x 610mm diameter,PT-076-15-0610, Brown
features: High density spiral wound cardboard tubes
Suitable for safe storing and postage of posters, plans, charts, maps and other large documents
All postal tubes supplied with two end plugs
description: Manufacturer's Description Postal Tubes Postal Tubes are a versatile form of mailing protection for the safe transit of awkward sized documents for which a postal bag is not suitable, or for items that must be rolled rather than folded. Durable and strong, our postal tubes are ideal for the safe storage and mailing of posters, plans, charts, maps, artwork, calendars and other large documents or long cylindrical objects. The product is manufactured from 100% recycled materials to produce a high density spiral wound cardboard tube with a strong, high quality brown kraft outer. All of our postal tubes come supplied with two 15mm white polyethylene end plugs, which are designed to fit tightly to ensure that the contents remain secure in transit. However they do reduce the length of the postal tube by 30mm at each end. This postal tube has a tube wall measurement of 1.5mm, an internal diameter of 76mm and is 330mm in length. We ensure your product arrives in pristine condition as our postal tubes are impressively tough, yet light enough to curb mailing costs. Made to Post Office specifications, and perfect for mail rooms, courier companies, drawing offices and mailing houses, our postal tubes provide all round protection and offer a simple yet effective way to post or store your products.
